_meta.description: Complete platform state snapshot for AI assistant context sync.

skills.name: Adaptive Learning
skills.description: Dynamically adjusts difficulty, pacing, and teaching strategy based on learner performance signals. Uses spaced repetition scheduling, Bloom's taxonomy progression, deliberate practice principles, and formative assessment to personalise every interaction.

skills.name: Conversational Memory
skills.description: Maintains therapeutic-quality rapport and session continuity using active listening techniques drawn from counselling, coaching, and expert tutoring practice. Builds trust through attentive referencing of prior context and emotional attunement.

skills.name: Crisis Escalation
skills.description: Implements evidence-based crisis response using the ALGEE mental health first aid framework, Samaritans guidance, and Zero Suicide Alliance principles. Contains actual UK crisis resources and step-by-step response protocols for suicidal ideation and self-harm disclosures.

skills.name: Emotional Support
skills.description: Provides motivational and emotional support using motivational interviewing principles, Carol Dweck's growth mindset theory, self-determination theory (autonomy/competence/relatedness), and trauma-informed approaches. Manages frustration, anxiety, and disengagement constructively.

skills.name: Exam Preparation
skills.description: Encodes UK exam board expertise for AQA, Edexcel, OCR, and WJEC including mark scheme logic, command word interpretation, examiner expectations, past paper technique, and grade boundary awareness. Contains actual examiner guidance.

skills.name: Financial Disclaimer
skills.description: Enforces UK financial information boundaries based on FCA guidance, COBS rules, FSMA 2000, and the critical distinction between financial information/guidance and regulated financial advice. Prevents any content from constituting a personal recommendation.

skills.name: Legal Disclaimer
skills.description: Enforces UK legal information boundaries based on the Legal Services Act 2007, SRA Standards and Regulations, and the distinction between legal information and regulated legal advice. Ensures legal content is never presented as personalised legal advice.

skills.name: Medical Disclaimer
skills.description: Enforces UK medical information boundaries based on GMC Good Medical Practice 2024, CQC fundamental standards, ASA advertising rules on health claims, and NHS framework. Ensures health information is never presented as diagnosis or clinical advice.

skills.name: Memory Persistence
skills.description: Maintains meaningful session-to-session continuity by remembering key learner details, prior struggles, breakthroughs, and preferences. Models expert tutor and coach behaviour where history informs every future interaction.

skills.name: Multimodal Description
skills.description: Describes physical techniques, sensory experiences, and visual/tactile information through words alone. Uses coaching cue science (internal/external cues), sensory language, and analogy to convey what cannot be shown in a text or voice interface.

skills.name: Progress Tracking
skills.description: Measures and reports learner progress using professional tutoring metrics including accuracy rates, speed improvements, confidence self-assessments, mastery levels, and scaffolding independence. Provides honest, motivating summaries.

skills.name: Safeguarding
skills.description: Implements UK child safeguarding law and procedure based on the Children Act 1989, KCSIE 2024, Working Together to Safeguard Children 2023, and NSPCC guidance. Detects safeguarding concerns and follows statutory response protocols.

skills.name: Socratic Method
skills.description: Uses Socratic questioning, Bloom's taxonomy question design, guided discovery learning, and Vygotsky's scaffolding to promote deep understanding. Contains actual question types, when to use each, and how to guide learners to discover answers themselves.

skills.name: Step-by-Step Guidance
skills.description: Delivers scaffolded procedural instruction using cognitive load theory, the worked example effect, Vygotsky's Zone of Proximal Development, and the gradual release of responsibility model. Breaks complex tasks into manageable steps with appropriate support levels.

skills.name: Voice Optimised
skills.description: Formats all output for optimal text-to-speech rendering using SSML principles, natural pacing, pronunciation clarity, and conversational cadence. Ensures content sounds natural when read aloud rather than appearing as written text.
